notes: Fossil (base3), released Oct 1999, early WOTC era. Set = 62 cards: 15 rare-holo, 15 rare, 16 uncommon, 16 common (Bulbapedia), matching the provided buckets exactly. Booster = 11 cards (Bulbapedia: Base Set through Neo Destiny boosters held 11 cards). Era structure: 1 rare-or-better slot + 3 uncommons + 7 commons (WOTC official pack odds, confirmed by search results). Holo rate ~1:3 packs: Flipside Gaming states 1:3; Elite Fourum community box reports cluster at ~12 holos per 36-pack box (12/36 = 1/3 exactly), range 9-15. So the rare slot yields a holo 1/3 of the time and a plain rare 2/3. NO reverse-holo slot — reverse holos were introduced in Legendary Collection (2002), AFTER Fossil; both Flipside Gaming and Bulbapedia confirm this. Hit bucket = rare-holo. confidence=medium: rate rests on community sampling (no large per-set published study) but is consistent across multiple independent sources and matches the documented 1:3 era average. Booster BOX = 36 packs (no ETB existed in this era). Expected holos per box ≈ 36 × 1/3 = 12, consistent with community box-opening reports.
